LanguageData.ELIFAH-1ZVAttack.label: AH-1Z Viper (Attack)
LanguageData.ELIFAH-1ZVAttack.description: DESCRIPTION: The AH-1Z is a helicopter designed for long range precision bombing, sacrificing bombing capacity for high-end computational computers for higher accuracy. BASIC STATS: Health: 1400 LOGISTICS POTENTIAL: Cargo Capacity: 500kg Speed: 8 Passenger Capacity: 1-2 Fuel Per Tile: 10 Fuel Capacity: 1060 Round Trip Range: 53 Full Range: 106 Internal Power: 700w ATTACK POTENTIAL: Bombing Run Capacity: 3 Precision Run Capacity: 7 Spread: 4 Distance between drops: 3
